description_long: This is a modern, high-back swivel chair with a sculpted, ergonomic form and a smooth, continuous surface upholstered in rich brown leather. The seat and backrest are seamlessly integrated, curving upward to form pronounced wing-like extensions that provide both head and lateral support. The chair sits atop a sturdy, black metal central support column that branches into four splayed legs, ensuring stability and allowing for 360-degree rotation. The upholstery appears tightly fitted, with subtle stitching running vertically along the center of the back and seat, enhancing its sleek, contemporary aesthetic. The absence of armrests and the deep, contoured seat suggest a design focused on comfort and relaxation, ideal for lounge or waiting areas in urban environments. The overall silhouette is both inviting and visually striking, making it a statement piece in any setting.
description: A modern, brown leather swivel chair with a high, winged back and a four-legged black metal base. Its sculpted, seamless form and deep seat offer ergonomic comfort and a striking visual presence.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deep, contoured seat and the dramatic upward curve of the high backrest with winged extensions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide, gently curved backrest and the central vertical seam in the upholstery.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the ergonomic seat contour and the pronounced headrest wings.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full width of the seat, the high back with winged sides, and the symmetrical, inviting design.
attribute_central_support_column: A black metal cylindrical column, fixed, branching into four splayed legs for stability.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, winged backrest with a continuous curve, high head support, contoured for comfort, upholstered in smooth brown leather with a central seam.
